---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you imagine this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Hardware Context

Is this feature specific to a particular TNC model or firmware version?

- TNC model: e.g. AEA PK-232MBX
- Firmware: e.g. v7.1
- Operating mode: e.g. PACTOR / Packet / AMTOR

## Additional Context

Any other information, screenshots, or references.
